subject: HAPPY NEW YEARS!!!

  Hope you are well and that you had a great New Years!
   
  I was in Sweden visiting my boyfriend. It would be great to meet up soon. 
   
  I have one question for you. My boyfriend is interested in bringing Victoria Secrets to Scandinavia . He has worked in investment banking (for Goldman Sachs) but has now left to invest in and run start-up companies. He believes Victoria Secrets would be an instant success in Scandinavia . Do you know how Victoria Secrets run their overseas operations? Is it a franchise business? 
   
  Would really be great to meet up soon. I miss our tea dates. 
   
  Love
   
  Ana

body_html:
Hi
 
Hope you are well and that you had a great New Years!
 
I was in Sweden visiting my boyfriend. It would be great to meet up soon.
 
I have one question for you. My boyfriend is interested in bringing Victoria Secrets to Scandinavia . He has worked in investment banking (for Goldman Sachs) but has now left to invest in and run start-up companies. He believes Victoria Secrets would be an instant success in Scandinavia . Do you know how Victoria Secrets run their overseas operations? Is it a franchise business?
 
Would really be great to meet up soon. I miss our tea dates.
 
Love
 
Ana
